revision.comment: get this onto its own page to start
Protected "[[Template:Plainlist/styles.css]]": match parent ([Edit=Require administrator access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))
「[[Template:Plainlist/styles.css]]」を保護しました: [[Wikipedia:保護依頼]]による: [[WP:HRT|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限)[移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
1 revision imported: importing all the coordinates module stuff with the timestamps removed in order to force updates
1 revision imported: I hope this manages to go through
1 revision imported: reimporting to fix errors
1 revision imported: importing these ahead in time so that it does not mess up
1 revision imported: importing categories I made
1 revision imported: importing everything for the citation needed templates
4 revisions imported from [[:en:Template:Plainlist/styles.css]]: could be useful
4 revisions imported from [[:en:Template:Plainlist/styles.css]]: could be useful

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: re-importing and overwriting due to the weird script failure

1 revision imported: importing [[Template:Commons category]] from English wikipedia with removed timestamps to overwrite existing code, attempting to fix an error that makes the link not properly appear.
1 revision imported: overwriting this template since it seems broken in how it treats unknown parameters in [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23035542121|commit triggered pipeline]]
